_comment: ANTA / TelecomTV connector wiring. anta-supabase expects the official Supabase MCP to be configured at user scope (project: anta-index, id umwrpkzdaafkcpizfrcf) — credentials live in the user's shell, not in this repo. filings-store has been removed: skills use WebFetch (URLs) and Read (local paths) instead. telecomtv-archive remains a forward-reference stub: TelecomTV does not yet expose a crawlable archive, and skills gracefully degrade when this MCP is unavailable. Remove this _comment key before going live.

telecomtv-archive._comment: FUTURE: TelecomTV editorial archive MCP. No standard MCP exists today and TelecomTV does not yet expose a crawlable archive. Skills referencing this (telecomtv-angle, editorial-leads, earnings-analysis, sector-overview-telco) handle absence cleanly — telecomtv-angle sets novelty='unknown', editorial-leads cross-checks only against Supabase telecomtv_angles rows, etc. Replace this entry with the real MCP URL once stood up.
